title: update 2M API docs format

body:
* add quantile and cdf calculations for generalized gamma distribution and exponential distribution parameterized in certain forms relevant for 2M microphysics.

This is useful to calculate lower and upper bounds for integrals against these distributions.
Strictly speaking, only the quantile functions are needed. The CDF is the inverse of the quantile, and are, for now, only used in tests to verify that the quantile works as expected.
title: add DistributionTools module to handle quantile calculations

title: lightly refactor 2M tests
